name: Asura Path Pein (S)
pageTitle: Asura Path Pein (S) - Naruto Arena Classic
description: Asura Path Pein (S) is one of the six paths of Pein. His body style is similar to a puppet filled with hidden weapons.

skills.name: Chakra Burst
skills.description: Asura prevents one enemy from becoming invulnerable or reducing damage, then deals 20 damage for 1 turn. During this time, any enemy that uses a new skill on him will take 10 damage. This skill will be replaced permanently.

skills.name: Cluster Bombs
skills.description: Asura Path bombs all enemies, dealing 20 piercing damage to them. For 1 turn, any enemy that uses a new harmful physical or chakra skill will be dealt 10 piercing damage.

skills.name: Heat Seeker
skills.description: Asura Path uses Heat Seeker on one enemy. After 3 turns, that enemy will take 25 piercing damage. This skill is invisible until triggered. This skill stacks.

skills.name: Rinnegan Evasion
skills.description: This skill makes Asura Path Pein (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Crown Shockwave
skills.description: Asura Path deals 20 damage to all enemies. The following turn, they will be dealt 5 affliction damage. This skill becomes 'Chakra Burst' after being used.
